name: How do I file a workers comp claim for my work neck injury in West Valley City?
description: Notify employer within 180 days, file Form 100 with Utah Labor Commission.[7]

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim for my work neck injury in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer within 180 days, file Form 100 with Utah Labor Commission.[7]
acceptedAnswer.description: Notify your employer in writing within 180 days, then file Form 100 with the Utah Labor Commission online or by mail.[7] The Commission mediates disputes after employer/insurer response.[1] Key factors: (1) Include injury details, date, witnesses; (2) Attach medical records; (3) Employer files accident report. Follow up if no response in 45 days; appeal denials to an ALJ. Timely filing secures your benefits.
